entities.name: MIKE SHE/MIKE 11
entities.description: Integrated hydrologic model used to evaluate groundwater and surface water levels and availability

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements used in conjunction with hydrologic models to evaluate water availability

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which water is used in agriculture

entities.name: WATER STORAGE
entities.description: Management option to sustain groundwater withdrawals and improve water levels

entities.name: ENERGY POLICY OPTIONS
entities.description: Policy measures evaluated to sustain future groundwater withdrawals

entities.name: GROUNDWATER WITHDRAWALS
entities.description: The extraction of water from underground aquifers for irrigation

entities.name: GROUNDWATER LEVELS
entities.description: The depth or height of the water table in an aquifer

entities.name: SURFACE WATER LEVELS
entities.description: The level of water in surface bodies like rivers and lakes

entities.name: SURFACE FLOWS
entities.description: The movement of water over the land surface

entities.name: SEMI-ARID WATERSHED
entities.description: A land area in a semi-arid region where water drains to a common point

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage

entities.name: BELOW AVERAGE RAINFALL
entities.description: Years with precipitation levels lower than the historical average

entities.name: WELL DRYING
entities.description: The state where irrigation wells no longer provide water due to falling water tables

entities.name: ENERGY DEMANDS
entities.description: The amount of energy required to operate irrigation pumps

entities.name: IRRIGATION PUMPS
entities.description: Mechanical devices used to extract groundwater for crop irrigation

entities.name: HYDROELECTRIC GENERATION
entities.description: The production of electricity from the flow of surface water

entities.name: WATER-FOOD-ENERGY NEXUS
entities.description: The interconnected relationship between water availability, food production, and energy consumption

entities.name: CROP FAILURE
entities.description: The loss of crops due to lack of water or other adverse conditions

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or commercial use

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: The winter cropping season in India, from November to February

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The summer cropping season in India, from March to May

entities.name: DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: A micro-irrigation system that saves water by allowing it to drip slowly to the roots

entities.name: FARM ELECTRICITY SUBSIDY
entities.description: Government financial support to reduce the cost of electricity for farmers

entities.name: FLOOD IRRIGATION
entities.description: A method of irrigation where water is pumped or diverted onto the field

entities.name: ELECTRIC ENERGY CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The total amount of electricity used for groundwater irrigation

entities.name: CARBON FOOTPRINT
entities.description: The total greenhouse gas emissions caused by irrigation activities

entities.name: HARD ROCK AQUIFERS
entities.description: Underground water-bearing layers consisting of hard rock

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study watershed is located

entities.name: SEMI-ARID HARD ROCK REGION
entities.description: A geographical area characterized by semi-arid climate and hard rock geology
